mapper.sql: id, class_number, class_name, start_time, end_time, class_status, institute_name, branch_name, class_desc, teacher_name, is_delete, version, create_time, last_access_time, old_class_name, old_class_num
mapper.select: select class_name from t_class where is_delete = 1

select
from t_class where class_name = #{className} and is_delete = 1

select c.id as cid, class_number, class_name, c.institute_name as c_institute_name, branch_name, start_time, end_time, class_status, -- 如果p.is_delete为0或者p.prof_status为0，则prof_name为''（空字符串），否则为prof_name CASE WHEN p.is_delete = 0 THEN '' ELSE prof_name END as prof_name from t_class c left join t_profession p on c.fk_profession_id = p.id where c.is_delete = 1
mapper.insert: insert into t_class(class_number, class_name, institute_name, branch_name, fk_profession_id, teacher_name, start_time, end_time, class_status, class_desc) values (#{classNumber}, #{className}, #{instituteName}, #{branchName}, #{profId}, #{teacherName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{classStatus}, #{classDesc})
mapper.select: select c.id as cid, class_number, class_name, c.institute_name as c_institute_name, branch_name, start_time, end_time, class_status, -- 如果p.is_delete为0，则prof_name为''（空字符串），否则为prof_name CASE WHEN p.is_delete = 0 THEN '' ELSE prof_name END as prof_name from t_class c left join t_profession p on c.fk_profession_id = p.id where class_number = #{classNumber} and class_name = #{className} and c.institute_name = #{instituteName} and branch_name = #{branchName} and fk_profession_id = #{profId} and c.is_delete = 1
mapper.update: update t_class set is_delete = 0 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select c.id as cid, class_number, class_name, c.institute_name as c_institute_name, branch_name, CASE WHEN pr.is_delete <> 0 AND pr.prof_status <> 0 THEN prof_name END as prof_name, teacher_name, start_time, end_time, class_desc, CASE WHEN p.is_delete <> 0 AND p.plan_status <> 0 THEN p.id END as pid, CASE WHEN p.is_delete <> 0 AND p.plan_status <> 0 THEN plan_name END as plan_name from t_class c left join t_profession pr on c.fk_profession_id = pr.id AND pr.is_delete <> 0 AND pr.prof_status <> 0 left join t_class_planmanager cp on c.id = cp.fk_class_id left join t_planmanager p on cp.fk_plan_id = p.id AND p.is_delete <> 0 AND p.plan_status <> 0 where c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update t_class_planmanager set fk_plan_id = #{planId} where fk_plan_id = #{prePlanId} and fk_class_id = #{classId}
mapper.select: select fk_plan_id from t_class_planmanager where fk_class_id = #{classId}
select fk_plan_id from t_class_planmanager where fk_plan_id = #{planId} and fk_class_id = #{classId}
mapper.update: update t_class set class_status = #{status} where id = #{id}
